title: Executive Brief
subtitle: Sutton SignWriting as research infrastructure
summary: First support-facing anchor for the Sutton SignWriting Infrastructure and Program series.
synopsis: This entry gives the shortest forwardable support-facing case for Sutton SignWriting. It frames the work as an existing global system with real assets, a real support gap, a stronger empirical base in Brazil, a current institutional proof point in South Korea, and a clear opportunity for a PI or host institution to convert informal stewardship into a durable program.
